ddls:
CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the student */,
  "middle_name" TEXT /* Middle name of the student (if applicable) */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the student */,
  "house" TEXT /* House affiliation of the student */,
  "birth_year" INTEGER /* Birth year of the student */,
  "password" TEXT /* Login password for the student */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the student */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the student */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the student */,
  "parent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student's parent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_students_parent_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_id") REFERENCES parents ("parent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_students_house FOREIGN KEY ("house") REFERENCES houses ("house_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "houses" (
  "house_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each house */,
  "house_name" TEXT /* Name of the house */,
  "founder" TEXT /* Founder of the house */,
  "values" TEXT /* Values represented by the house */,
  "house_color" TEXT /* Colors associated with the house */,
  "house_animal" TEXT /* Animal associated with the house */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("house_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teachers" (
  "teacher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each teacher */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the teacher */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the teacher */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the teacher */,
  "subject" TEXT /* Subject taught by the teacher */,
  "password" TEXT /* Login password for the teacher */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the teacher */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("teacher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parents" (
  "parent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parent */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the parent */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the parent */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the parent */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the parent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("parent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "classes" (
  "class_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each class */,
  "teacher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the teacher teaching the class */,
  "subject" TEXT /* Subject of the class */,
  "class_name" TEXT /* Name of the class */,
  "class_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the class */,
  "credits" INTEGER /* Number of credits associated with the class */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("class_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_classes_teacher_id FOREIGN KEY ("teacher_id") REFERENCES teachers ("teacher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "student_classes" (
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each enrollment event */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student enrolled in the class */,
  "class_id" INTEGER /* ID of the class the student is enrolled in */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date when the student enrolled in the class */,
  "grade" TEXT /* Grade of the student in the class */,
  "attendance" TEXT /* Attendance record of the student in the class */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enrollment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_classes_class_id FOREIGN KEY ("class_id") REFERENCES classes ("class_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_classes_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "friendships" (
  "friendship_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each friendship */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "friend_id" INTEGER /* ID of the friend */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("friendship_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_friendships_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_friendships_friend_id FOREIGN KEY ("friend_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "student_achievements" (
  "achievement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each achievement */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "achievement_name" TEXT /* Name of the achievement */,
  "achievement_date" TEXT /* Date of the achievement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("achievement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_achievements_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "student_organizations" (
  "membership_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each membership */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "organization_name" TEXT /* Name of the organization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("membership_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_organizations_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "messages" (
  "message_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each message */,
  "sender_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sender */,
  "receiver_id" INTEGER /* ID of the receiver */,
  "message_text" TEXT /* Text of the message */,
  "message_date" TEXT /* Date of the message */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("message_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_messages_sender_id FOREIGN KEY ("sender_id") REFERENCES teachers ("teacher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_messages_receiver_id FOREIGN KEY ("receiver_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assignment */,
  "class_id" INTEGER /* ID of the class */,
  "assignment_name" TEXT /* Name of the assignment */,
  "due_date" TEXT /* Due date of the assignment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assignments_class_id FOREIGN KEY ("class_id") REFERENCES classes ("class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "student_assignments" (
  "submission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each submission */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the assignment */,
  "submission_date" TEXT /* Date of the submission */,
  "grade" TEXT /* Grade of the submission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("submission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_assignments_assignment_id FOREIGN KEY ("assignment_id") REFERENCES assignments ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_assignments_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)
column_names: Middle name of the student (if applicable)
ID of the teacher teaching the class
Number of credits associated with the class
Unique identifier for each enrollment event
ID of the student enrolled in the class
ID of the class the student is enrolled in
Date when the student enrolled in the class
Grade of the student in the class
Attendance record of the student in the class
